evidence.before: Bureau feed A (monthly refresh), 36-month training window
evidence.after: Bureau feed B (weekly refresh), 24-month training window

dimensions.reason: behavior changed; no critical risk flag

evidence.after: GBM v3.2 retrained on new feed, decision cutoff 590

dimensions.reason: controls changed; critical flag(s) ['threshold_loosened'] weaken a control / broaden autonomy / move regulatory surface (finding only, not a decision)

evidence.before: Auto-decline at 620 with mandatory manual review band 580-620
evidence.after: Auto-decline at 590 with manual-review band narrowed to 560-590

dimensions.reason: testing changed; no critical risk flag

evidence.before: Backtest on 2023-2024 vintages; fairness test quarterly
evidence.after: Backtest refreshed to 2024-2025 vintages; fairness test cadence unchanged

dimensions.reason: regulatory changed; critical flag(s) ['regulatory_surface_changed'] weaken a control / broaden autonomy / move regulatory surface (finding only, not a decision)

evidence.before: ECOA/Reg B adverse-action reason codes mapped to the 620 cutoff
evidence.after: Adverse-action reason-code mapping must be revalidated for the 590 cutoff

recommended_governance_path: Independent model validation and change-governance adjudication required before any deployment
adjudicator_prompts: Confirm the change is within the model's approved use; a net-new use case is an intake, not a change.
Verify independent validation coverage for each changed component before deployment.
Confirm fair-lending / adverse-action impact of any threshold or cutoff change.
Confirm data-lineage and provenance review for any changed data source.
Confirm monitoring and rollback are in place for the changed behavior.
Record the human adjudication decision and rationale in the change record.
narrative: Change MCR-2026-0042 to high-materiality, regulated model MDL-00731 changes five dimensions: data (new bureau feed and shorter training window), behavior (retrained GBM and lower cutoff), controls (auto-decline threshold loosened from 620 to 590), testing (refreshed backtest vintages), and regulatory (adverse-action reason-code mapping must be revalidated for the new cutoff). Two changes carry critical flags (threshold_loosened, regulatory_surface_changed), so the deterministic impact band is Critical. Recommended revalidation scope: Full independent revalidation before deployment. Recommended governance path: independent model validation and change-governance adjudication before any deployment. A human adjudicator must review the cited evidence and decide; this analysis does not itself clear the change. Impact assessment and revalidation recommendation only; not a change approval or deployment authorization. No model change has been approved, deployed, or attested.
disclaimer: Impact assessment and revalidation recommendation only; not a change approval or deployment authorization. No model change has been approved, deployed, or attested.
